title: Peter Keohane
compiled_truth: Peter Keohane is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (1999-01-08 to 2002-02-06), Peter Keohane sent 136 and received 1199 emails, totalling 1335 interactions. Top correspondents: [Greg Johnston](people/greg-johnston) (38), [Mark Haedicke](people/mark-haedicke) (36), [Sharon Crawford](people/sharon-crawford) (32), [Tana Jones](people/tana-jones) (31), [Rob Milnthorp](people/rob-milnthorp) (30). Mailbox folders observed: _americas, albertappas, archive, deleted_items, inbox.
